\n<Naruto> \c[10] (There must be something I can do.)\
In this game you have the possibility to craft your equipment, but for
that you need to unlock the recipe first.
As you can see, in the upper right corner you can see
how many recipes you know. I currently have 0/27,
as I did not unlock any of them.
Currently the way to unlock recipes is to buy them from a merchant,
in this case, the antique store.
Once you buy it you automatically unlock the recipes contained in that book.
More ways to get different items will be added throughout the development!
Now that you have the recipe, the possibility of crafting an item appears,
but you do not have the necessary materials.
To get them you can defeat enemies and/or buy them in the different stores.
It is of vital importance that you do not omit this stage of
the game, since without good equipment you will not be able
to advance and defeat the most complicated bosses.\..\..\..
One last thing, the equipment may vary a little bit in stats
each time you craft it, keep that in mind.
